findings.location: s3 — W11AC01Form.java code example and implementation points
findings.description: The `getSearchConditionProps()` method is completely omitted from s3. In the source, this method appears between `SEARCH_CONDITION_PROPS` and `validateForSearch()` with the explicit comment `// 【説明】精査対象プロパティのゲッターを追加`, indicating it is a required implementation step. The three implementation points in s3 describe overriding setters, defining SEARCH_CONDITION_PROPS, and adding isValidSearchCondition(), but never mention adding this getter. An AI following this knowledge file would produce an incomplete Form class.

Missing `StringUtil` from hints. `StringUtil` is a PascalCase class name used in the source code (`StringUtil.hasValue(...)`) inside `isValidSearchCondition()`. Per V4 criteria, PascalCase class names appearing in section content must be included in hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `return StringUtil.hasValue(getLoginId(), getKanjiName(), getKanaName(), getUgroupId(), getUserIdLocked());`

findings.description: Missing `SqlPStatement` from hints. The source explicitly names `SqlPStatement` as the class NOT to use (contrasted with `ParameterizedSqlPStatement`), making it a PascalCase class name appearing in the section's decision-relevant content.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `プリペアドステートメントを作成する際に、SqlPStatementクラスではなく、ParameterizedSqlPStatementクラスを使用する`
